administrative_body.query_template:
Write a SPARQL query to find the URI of the {classification_class} {entity_label} in region {location}, execute it and return the results.
Keep iterating until you find the best possible match. Provide reasoning for your selection.

location.query_template:
Search for the {classification_class} {entity_label} in region {location}. Return the best matching URI.
Provide reasoning for your selection.
